name: workflow-atlas
description: Specify a project's state nodes and operation flows as JSON, and read them as a single self-contained interactive HTML specification — state × operation, not boxes × arrows.

interface.shortDescription: Read a project's states and operations as a single interactive HTML spec, authored from JSON.
interface.longDescription: Declare a project's state nodes and the operations (flows) that transform between them as JSON; a generic engine renders one self-contained, offline, keyboard-walkable HTML specification with nine swappable color schemes. Author edits only data — build via an optional Node CLI or by editing the template's embedded JSON directly (works on any OS, no runtime required).
defaultPrompt: Make an interactive spec of my system's states and operations.
Turn this pipeline into a single-file interactive workflow atlas.
Document this service as state × operation and let me walk each flow.
